_doc: Street-sighting inbox. Owner drops raw menu strings here (or just tells Claude in chat); each gets triaged per the workflow in CLAUDE.md. status: open | covered | alias-added | variant-added | promoted | rejected.

sightings.name: bánh bèo
sightings.note: already in dataset as banh-beo; searchable with or without diacritics

sightings.name: trộn lộn xộn
sightings.seen: small local shop near owner's home, Da Nang
sightings.note: 'lộn xộn' = jumbled/messy; almost certainly a local 'trộn' family snack (tossed mix). Hypothesis: house-mix cousin of bánh tráng trộn / mít trộn. NEEDS OWNER INTEL: what's actually in the cup/bag (rice paper? green mango? jackfruit? jerky? quail egg?), price, how it's served. If contents ≈ bánh tráng trộn -> aka; if distinct mix -> own entry.

sightings.name: gan bu um (owner's spelling)
sightings.note: Doesn't decode cleanly. Candidates: (1) 'gân bò um' — braised beef tendon, quán nhậu dish; (2) 'gà ủ muối' — salt-rested chicken, the booming takeaway-shop genre; (3) 'gà um …' — central braised chicken. NEEDS: photo of the sign / shop type / braised vs whole-roasted.

sightings.name: trà đào đặc biệt
sightings.note: variant-added: on tra-dao ('đặc biệt' = each shop's house mix)
